name: Frozen Peach Daiquiris
recipeIngredient: 2 cans Fresh peach or 4 canned Peach halves; chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients, except lime slices and cherries, in a large bowl.
2. Cover and freeze for 8 hours.
3. To serve, place the frozen mixture into a container of an electric blender.
4. Blend the mixture until smooth.
5. Garnish with lime slices and cherries.
6. Serve immediately.
